---
description: "Append an informational log entry"
agent: "agent"
---
Update the repository log files from the current chat context.

Append a concise informational entry to these files under `.wiki/orchestrator/`:
- `Skill-Usage-Log.md`
- `Behavior-Log.md`

Use the current conversation and selected text, if any, to infer the event being logged. Preserve existing content and append a timestamped entry at the end of each file. Keep the entry brief and factual.
